name: Witchcrafter Confusion Confession
name_jp: ウィッチクラフト・コンフュージョン
desc: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as material, including a "Witchcrafter" monster. During your End Phase, if you control a "Witchcrafter" monster while this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand. You can only use 1 "Witchcrafter Confusion Confession" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as material, including a "Witchcrafter" monster. During your End Phase, if you control a "Witchcrafter" monster while this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand. You can only use 1 "Witchcrafter Confusion Confession" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
